stemHtml: The Primary Flight Display (PFD) of an EFIS equipped aircraft can display information relative to the following conditions…

options.a: altitude capture, braking system, autopilot and flight director mode changes.
options.b: low engine oil pressure, terrain alerts, windshear detection.
options.c: pressurisation failure, altitude capture, TCAS resolution advisory.
options.d: altitude capture, TCAS resolution advisory, autopilot and flight director mode changes.
